title: No Sniffing
description: Stops the warden from sniffing, it will wander around or stay still instead.
body:
# No Sniffing  
No Sniffing prevents the Warden from sniffing, instead it will wander around or stand still.  
Thank you [JudgeAlexander](https://www.youtube.com/@JudgeAlex) for the idea!

##  
Also check out the [Cursed Mods Collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/npoI3wH2).
